Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action
Off Calendar Feb-10-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Sonia Wong, CSR#11288.
Mai Mandel, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Jalease Smith, mother and guardian ad litem for Minor: Justin Wilson; present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examinded.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $4,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $1,000.00 payable to Law Office of Michael Wohlstradter.
Total allowance for fees and expenses from the settlement or judgment: $1,000.00
A net balance of $3,000.00 to be used for payment of minor's Healthcare need. Payment to Image Orthodontics, Sourth San Francisco.
Status Hearing Scheduled on April 23, 2015 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the payment of Orthodontic Services to Image Orthodontics South San Francisco. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Depart. 514 prior to Hearing.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-26-2014 Continued To Mar-25-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
